zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Anne Hewett於1543年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾威爾斯時，她的父親Sir William Hewett42歲，母親Alice Leveson29歲。她於從1562年1月11日到1563年1月10日與Sir Edward Osborne在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1585年7月14日在英國瓦維其可爾比米加姆聖 馬丁 在 馮 布爾 林 邱奇享年42歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 克萊門特 易亞斯亞普 煙雨 聖 馬丁 奧爾加。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Anne Hewett于1543年出生在英国英格兰越可爾威爾斯时，她的父亲Sir William Hewett42岁，母亲Alice Leveson29岁。她于从1562年1月11日到1563年1月10日与Sir Edward Osborne在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1585年7月14日在英国瓦維其可爾比米加姆聖 馬丁 在 馮 布爾 林 邱奇享年42岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 克萊門特 易亞斯亞普 煙雨 聖 馬丁 奧爾加。

nameMeanings.name: Hewett
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Hewitt
meanings: from the Middle English personal name Hewet, Huet, Hughet, Howet, pet forms of Hugh (Middle English Hewe, Hue; see Hugh and compare Hew ). The spelling Hughet stood for both Huet and the synonymous Huget; see Huggett . This surname has also been established in Ireland since the 14th century.

habitational name from Hewitts in Chelsfield or Hewitts in Willesborough (both Kent), both named from Old English hīewett ‘cutting’, denoting a place where trees had been cut down. Here there lived families called de la Hewatte (1270), de la hewett (1301), and atte Hewete (1338). The name may also be topographic for someone who lived in a newly made clearing in a wood.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Anne Hewett was born in 1543, in Wales, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Hewett, was 42 and her mother, Alice Leveson, was 29. She married Sir Edward Osborne from 11 January 1562 to 10 January 1563, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 14 July 1585, in St Martin in the Bull Ring Church, Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 42, and was buried in London St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Anne Hewett est née en 1543, à Wales, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Hewett, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Alice Leveson, avait 29 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Edward Osborne du 11 janvier 1562 au 10 janvier 1563, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 juillet 1585, à St Martin in the Bull Ring Church, Birmingham, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterrée à London St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Anne Hewett 1543 in Wales, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Hewett 42 und ihre Mutter Alice Leveson 29. Sie hat von 11. Januar 1562 bis 10. Januar 1563 in London, England Sir Edward Osborne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Juli 1585 im Alter von 42 Jahren in St Martin in the Bull Ring Church, Birmingham, Warwickshire, England und wurde in London St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Hewett è nata il nel 1543 nel Wales, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Hewett, aveva 42 anni e sua madre, Alice Leveson, aveva 29 anni. Lei sposato Sir Edward Osborne da 11 gennaio 1562 a 10 gennaio 1563, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 14 luglio 1585, nel St Martin in the Bull Ring Church, Birmingham, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolta a London St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Hewettが1543年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアワレスで生まれた時，父Sir William Hewettは42歳，母Alice Levesonは29歳であった。から1562年1月11日まで1563年1月10日にイギリスロンドンでSir Edward Osborneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1585年7月14日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアバーミンガムスト マルティン イン ス ブル リング チャーチで42歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト クレメント エアストチェアップ ウィス スト マルティン オルガーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Anne Hewett(이)가 1543년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 월스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Hewett(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Leveson(은)는 29세였다. 그녀는 1562년 1월 11일부터 1563년 1월 10일까지 영국 런던에서 Sir Edward Osborne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1585년 7월 14일 영국 워윅실르 비밍함 스트 마틴 인 테 불 링 c후르치에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 클레멘트 이스트체아프 위스 스트 마틴 르가에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Anne Hewett nasceu em 1543, em Wales, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Hewett, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Alice Leveson, tinha 29 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Edward Osborne de 11 de janeiro de 1562 a 10 de janeiro de 1563, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de julho de 1585, em St Martin in the Bull Ring Church, Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 42 anos, e foi sepultada em London St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Anne Hewett родилась в 1543 г. в местности веилесь, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Hewett было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Leveson, 29. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Edward Osborne с 11 января 1562 по 10 января 1563 в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 14 июля 1585 г. в местности ст мартинь ин т булл ринг чурч, бирмингхам, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 42 лет и была похоронена в местности лондон ст клемент эасчип вит ст мартинь оргар, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Anne Hewett nació en 1543, en Wales, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir William Hewett, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Alice Leveson, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Sir Edward Osborne desde 11 de enero de 1562 hasta 10 de enero de 1563, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 14 de julio de 1585, en St Martin in the Bull Ring Church, Birmingham, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultada en London St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
